overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a spacesuit-clad character walking through a dusty industrial spaceport facility. The character emerges from a covered walkway into an open landing area, approaches and walks beneath a massive landed spaceship, and continues toward industrial scaffolding. The environment features hazy orange atmospheric lighting, metal structures, and concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with metal scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered industrial walkway with metal beams overhead

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding and support beams lining the walkway
metal roof structure providing partial cover overhead
stacked crates and machinery on the right side of the walkway
gray concrete walking surface with visible seams and markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a semi-covered industrial walkway with metal scaffolding on the left and equipment crates on the right. The area is sheltered with partial sky visibility, featuring concrete flooring and industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open landing pad approaching massive spacecraft

events.description: exits covered walkway into open industrial landing area
emerges from shadow into hazy sunlight

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive landed spaceship visible in the distance across the open concrete platform

entered.detail: enormous dark-colored spacecraft with multiple engines and landing gear, initially appearing as a large industrial structure
tall industrial structures and towers in the distant background
short orange safety posts marking the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into a wide-open landing area with full sky visibility and hazy sunlight. The massive landed spaceship becomes visible ahead, growing larger as the character approaches across the concrete platform.

events.description: enters the shadow beneath the massive spaceship hull
slight turn to right while walking under the ship to navigate around landing gear

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive spaceship, looking up at the hull details and engine nacelles overhead

entered.detail: large cylindrical engine pods with multiple exhaust ports on the left side of the ship
massive metal landing gear and support struts holding the ship above the ground
metal staircase and scaffolding leading up to the ship

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive spaceship, which now dominates the view overhead and blocks most of the sky. The lighting becomes darker under the ship's shadow. Large engine nacelles and landing gear structures become visible on either side as the character navigates forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial area with orange scaffolding

events.description: exits from beneath the spaceship into open area with scaffolding ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing past the ship toward orange scaffolding and industrial structures on the other side

entered.detail: tall orange metal scaffolding and stair structure ahead
large industrial containers and crates stacked on the left side
tall lighting poles and industrial towers in the distant right background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from beneath the spaceship back into the open area with full sky visibility. The massive ship now recedes to the left rear as the character approaches an orange scaffolding tower and industrial storage containers ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial corridor into a vast landing bay dominated by a colossal spaceship. It begins with the character walking through a semi-covered walkway flanked by metal scaffolding and equipment crates under a partially obscured sky. As the character exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide concrete platform bathed in hazy sunlight, where a massive landed spaceship looms ahead and grows larger with every step. The environment then shifts into deep shadow as the character passes beneath the ship's hull, navigating between towering engine nacelles and landing gear that block out the sky. Finally, the camera emerges back into the open light, leaving the ship to recede in the background while moving toward an orange scaffolding tower and industrial storage containers.
